ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "label" TEXT /* Country or region where the survey was conducted */,
  "confidence" INTEGER /* Confidence score reported by respondents */,
  "convenience" INTEGER /* Convenience score reported by respondents */,
  "complacency" INTEGER /* Complacency score reported by respondents */,
  "other" INTEGER /* Other relevant metrics reported by respondents */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., public opinion, policy feedback) */,
  "survey_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the survey (e.g., government performance, social services) */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the overall quality of the data collected */,
  "total_respondents" INTEGER /* Total number of respondents for the survey */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link the survey to a country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" INTEGER /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondent_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey to which the feedback relates */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the respondent */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the overall satisfaction level of the respondent */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the feedback is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondent_feedback_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondent_feedback_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "respondent_name" TEXT /* Name of the respondent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the respondent */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the respondent */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the respondent */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the respondent */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link the user to a role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys_users" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link the survey to a user */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link the user to a survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id", "user_id")
)
